description: Senior backend engineer, 7 years Python/FastAPI. Strong in databases and cloud infrastructure. No Kubernetes, no Salesforce/CRM, no ML/data science background.

resume.title: Senior Software Engineer
resume.summary: Backend engineer with 7 years building production APIs, data pipelines, and internal tooling. Strong in Python and PostgreSQL. Comfortable with cloud infrastructure on AWS. Enjoys mentoring junior engineers and improving developer experience.

work_experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Led backend rewrite of the core API from Django to FastAPI, reducing p99 latency by 40%
Designed and implemented a multi-tenant job queue using Redis and Celery, processing 500k tasks/day
Mentored 3 junior engineers through structured code reviews and weekly 1:1s
Migrated 8 PostgreSQL tables to partitioned schemas, cutting slow-query incidents by 70%
Drove adoption of Docker Compose for local development across a team of 12 engineers
Collaborated with product and design to ship self-serve onboarding, reducing support tickets by 30%

work_experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built ETL pipelines in Python to ingest data from 6 third-party APIs into a central PostgreSQL warehouse
Developed internal REST APIs consumed by 3 product teams
Introduced automated integration tests that caught 4 regressions before production deploys
Maintained AWS Lambda functions for async event processing

work_experience.title: Junior Software Engineer
bullets: Built CRUD endpoints in Flask for an early-stage B2B SaaS product
Fixed bugs and wrote unit tests for a payment integration

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

repos.name: fastapi-template
repos.readme_summary: A production-ready FastAPI starter with JWT auth, SQLAlchemy models, Alembic migrations, and pytest fixtures. Used by 3 teams internally before being open-sourced.

repos.name: pg-query-log
repos.readme_summary: CLI tool for parsing and summarizing PostgreSQL slow-query logs. Outputs a ranked table of slow queries with avg/p95/p99 latency and suggested index candidates.

repos.name: csv-to-api
repos.readme_summary: Weekend project: reads a CSV file and auto-generates a REST API with filtering and pagination. Thin wrapper around FastAPI and pandas.
